name: WH
keywords: WhiteHole TimeLane WH_LANE wh_write_record wh_read_record WH_CAP wh_cap 32768 circular overflow mod
desc: Tick-indexed circular append area. WH_CAP=32768 records (2-cell each). Replay window=[save_tick-WH_CAP, save_tick].

name: BH
keywords: BlackHole energy TTL decay pid bh_decay_energy bh_set_energy bh_get_energy BH_STATE
desc: Decay-only stabilization. pid→cell: x=BH_X0+(pid%BH_W), y=BH_Y0+(pid/BH_W). Energy in cell.G.

name: CONTROL
keywords: Control Region reserved tiles gate_id 2080..2275 FreeMap FS_RESERVED_LO FS_RESERVED_HI fs_freemap_init
desc: Reserved control tiles (tile_x 32..35, tile_y 32..35). Pre-marked in FreeMap. gate_id 2080..2275.

name: CVP_HEADER
keywords: CvpHeader magic CVP1 version scan_policy bpage_version contract_hash CVP_CONTRACT_HASH_V1 CVP_LOCK_SKIP wh_cap save_tick header_crc CRC32
desc: CVP file header (44 bytes). Locks: scan_policy, bpage_version, contract_hash, wh_cap. CRC covers bytes 0..39.

name: CVP_SECTIONS
keywords: TLV CANVAS_BASE GATE_STATE WH_LANE BH_STATE SEC_CANVAS_BASE SEC_GATE_STATE SEC_WH_LANE SEC_BH_STATE type len crc payload
desc: CVP TLV section stream. Format: [type:u16][len:u32][crc:u32][data]. 4 section types defined.
